Manga.title: Manga
Manga.description: A manga entry tracked by the user

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this entry

imageUrl.description: The URL of the manga cover image

url.description: The URL of the manga on an external site

currentChapter.description: The last chapter read by the user

totalChapters.description: The total number of chapters available

lastUpdated.description: The date the last chapter was released

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the entry was created
